Executive summary

Run: sim1_baseline · branch A · 30 day(s) · 10 residents · generated 2026-07-17 15:47:38.441319.

This is a fully auditable account of one branch of the multi-agent simulation over the fixed 10-resident module. All data is synthetic.

Per-resident risk trajectories

Each panel plots the model’s reported fall probability over the run: 24-hour (blue) and 7-day (orange). Dates run left→right; probability on the y-axis.

Validation — virtual case-use evidence

This run is presented as a virtual case use of the system. Four validation axes accompany it: (i) technical integrity, (ii) experimental validity, (iii) clinical face-validity, and (iv) safety / leakage.

(i) Technical integrity

Automated daily gates over biological plausibility and model-output sanity.

Gate family Outcomes All predictions in [0,1]
Biological plausibility pass 30 / warn 0 / fail 0 —
Model-output sanity pass 30 / warn 0 / fail 0 TRUE
All checkpoints pass 120 / warn 0 / fail 0 —

(ii) Experimental validity (observable side)

The blind P08 experiment’s hidden A/B fall outcome is a separate privileged analysis and is deliberately absent here. What the report can show is P08’s observable model risk and, on the intervention branch, whether the scripted preventive intervention was logged.

## Branch **A**. Intervention fired: **FALSE**.
## P08 peak 7-day model risk: **42.8%**.
## _A/B fall-outcome comparison is a separate privileged analysis; this report shows only observable model risk._

(iii) Clinical face-validity

Each resident’s designed risk signature (from their ficha) paired with the observed model outcome, for eyeball validation that trajectories behave as intended.

Resident Expected signature Observed final 7d tier Observed peak 7d
P01 fear-of-falling: activity below physical capacity, worse without physio Low 68.2%
P02 Parkinson’s wearing-off: mobility fluctuates around med timing Moderate 86.1%
P03 night-concentrated risk; daytime activity non-predictive Low 35.1%
P04 stable low-risk control (social connector) Low 6.9%
P05 afternoon knee pain: PM mobility below AM Low 55.4%
P06 progressive decline over 5-7 days after new diuretic High 96.8%
P07 morning instability/drowsiness (night benzodiazepine) Moderate 71.2%
P08 subtle risk not obvious from step volume (blind experiment) Moderate 42.8%
P09 high stable baseline; occasional night agitation Moderate 67.1%
P10 non-linear post-hospital recovery (upward trend) Low 21.8%

(iv) Safety / leakage attestation

The report payload and the P08 clinical surface are scanned for any restricted field (latent, hazard, fall_sampled, intervention_fired). The hidden ground-truth table has no exported getter by design.

## - Restricted pattern scanned: `latent|hazard|fall_sampled|intervention_fired`
## - Leaked fields found in report payload: **0**
## - Ground-truth getter exported: **FALSE**
## - P08 clinical surface clean: **TRUE**
## 
## **Attestation: PASS** <U+2014> no hidden P08 experiment state leaked onto any clinical surface.

Synthetic data only. Not for clinical use.
